headline: Nucor Opens Lexington Rebar Micro Mill To Target Infrastructure Demand
summary: Nucor (NYSE:NUE) officially opened its Nucor Steel Lexington rebar micro mill to serve infrastructure projects in the South Atlantic and I-85 corridor. The facility is designed to supply rebar using recycled steel and local supply chains. The new mill targets construction and infrastructure demand in a key regional growth belt. Nucor, a major US steel producer with a focus on recycled steel, is adding fresh capacity in rebar at a time when infrastructure-related construction remains a...
